prompt: A stylish young woman with sleek dark hair styled back, defined brows, minimal elegant makeup, sits confidently on a modern gold-framed wire-back bar stool, one leg crossed casually over the other, one hand resting relaxed on her knee, gazing directly at camera with a poised, confident expression. She wears a tailored houndstooth/plaid wool blazer over a fitted burgundy turtleneck sweater, paired with straight-leg navy tailored trousers and white leather sneakers with black and orange accent detailing. She leans back naturally against a plain white studio wall. The wall behind her is styled as an eclectic gallery display of empty picture frames in varied finishes — ornate gold baroque frames, a wooden frame, plain white frames, a black square frame, and gold oval/circular frames — arranged asymmetrically at different heights, with a single wooden clothes hanger hanging from a hook among them. Concrete-toned studio floor below. Natural soft daylight studio lighting with subtle warm highlights, sharp editorial fashion photography, high-end lookbook/campaign aesthetic, muted sophisticated color palette of burgundy, navy, tan, gold, and white, shallow depth of field keeping focus sharp on the model while frames soften slightly in background, vertical full-body composition.
promptEn: A stylish young woman with sleek dark hair styled back, defined brows, minimal elegant makeup, sits confidently on a modern gold-framed wire-back bar stool, one leg crossed casually over the other, one hand resting relaxed on her knee, gazing directly at camera with a poised, confident expression. She wears a tailored houndstooth/plaid wool blazer over a fitted burgundy turtleneck sweater, paired with straight-leg navy tailored trousers and white leather sneakers with black and orange accent detailing. She leans back naturally against a plain white studio wall. The wall behind her is styled as an eclectic gallery display of empty picture frames in varied finishes — ornate gold baroque frames, a wooden frame, plain white frames, a black square frame, and gold oval/circular frames — arranged asymmetrically at different heights, with a single wooden clothes hanger hanging from a hook among them. Concrete-toned studio floor below. Natural soft daylight studio lighting with subtle warm highlights, sharp editorial fashion photography, high-end lookbook/campaign aesthetic, muted sophisticated color palette of burgundy, navy, tan, gold, and white, shallow depth of field keeping focus sharp on the model while frames soften slightly in background, vertical full-body composition.
promptZh: 一位时尚的年轻女性，留着利落的后梳深色短发，眉形精致，妆容简约优雅。她自信地坐在现代金色金属丝靠背吧台椅上，一条腿随意地叠在另一条腿上，一只手放松地放在膝盖上，神情从容自信，直视镜头。她身穿 剪裁合身的千鸟格/格纹羊毛西装外套，内搭修身酒红色高领毛衣，下身搭配直筒海军蓝西装裤和带有黑橙色点缀的白色皮革运动鞋。她自然地倚靠在纯白色的影棚墙壁前。她身后的墙面装饰为 不拘一格的画廊展示，挂满了各种材质的空画框 —— 包括华丽的金色巴洛克风格画框、木质画框、纯白画框、黑色方形画框以及金色椭圆形/圆形画框 —— 它们以不对称的方式错落有致地排列，其中一个挂钩上还挂着一个木质衣架。地面为混凝土质感的影棚地坪。采用自然柔和的日间影棚光，带有微妙的暖色高光，呈现出锐利的时尚杂志摄影质感，具备高端 Lookbook/广告大片的审美。整体色调为柔和且高级的酒红色、海军蓝、棕褐色、金色和白色。浅景深效果使焦点清晰地落在模特身上，背景中的画框略显柔和，采用竖构图全身照。
